changeSet.author: nexus-146xx.10
changeSet.comment: Create ladder_completions table mirroring the SQLite rung_completions schema with tenant_id (bookkeeping only — position is always derived, never stored)
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE nexus.ladder_completions ( tenant_id TEXT NOT NULL, rung_name TEXT NOT NULL, verified_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, package_version TEXT NOT NULL, detail TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', CONSTRAINT ladder_completions_pk PRIMARY KEY (tenant_id, rung_name) );
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.ladder_completions CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-146xx.10
changeSet.comment: Enable and force RLS; create tenant isolation policy
